arts.ttl: One Real Madrid star completed 101/102 passes vs Atlético
arts.sum: One member of the midfield ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid managed to complete all but one of his passes during the club’s meeting with Atlético. The player in…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid, Atletico penalty drama, draw keeps LaLiga title race tight
arts.sum: Saturday's Madrid derby was typically feisty and had a controversial moment with yet another penalty to debate; in the end, the draw only benefited Barcelona in LaLiga's tight title race.

arts.ttl: Mbappe rescues Real Madrid in draw with Atlético
arts.sum: Real Madrid salvaged a 1-1 draw against city rivals Atlético Madrid in LaLiga on Saturday with Kylian Mbappé scoring a second-half goal to cancel out Julián Álvarez's first-half opener for the visiting side.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe Becomes Youngest Player in History to Reach Incredible Goalscoring Milestone
arts.sum: At 26 years old, Kylian Mbappé became the youngest player in history to reach 500 goal contributions.

arts.ttl: Ratings: Oblak and Atlético weather the storm as derby day ends in a draw
arts.sum: His impact was reduced in the second half as Madrid pushed for a winning goal. Eager to clear the ball whenever the opportunity arose in an excellent first half display soured by a yellow card in the final seconds.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star Raúl Asencio drew comparisons with a club legend during Atlético clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid youngster Raúl Asencio drew comparisons with one of the greatest players in the club’s storied history, on Saturday evening. This came owing to his performance in the Madrid…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 1-1 Atletico Madrid: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Kylian Mbappe rescues Los Blancos in tense title showdown
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe cancels out a controversial penalty from Julian Alvarez, as Real Madrid come from a goal behind to draw 1-1 with Atletico Madrid in La Liga on Saturday night.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 1-1 Atletico Madrid: Player ratings as spoils shared in derby draw
arts.sum: Player ratings from Real Madrid 1-1 Atletico Madrid in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 1–1 Atletico Madrid: Player Ratings As Kylian Mbappe Scores in First Madrid Derby
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé scored Real Madrid's lone goal in their 1–1 draw with Atlético Madrid.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid maintain their slender lead in La Liga as they hold Atlético to a 1-1 draw
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Atlético have just played out a 1-1 draw at the Bernabéu as Diego Simeone’s men challenged their Madrid rivals for a place at the top of the…
